metadata.title: Northwind owner blocked after a successful credential update
metadata.description: Fresh regression coverage for evidence-led lockout handling on a different organization.

visible.customer_issue: The customer says the new password is accepted, but workspace access remains blocked and support is required.
visible.starting_prompt: Resolve ticket tkt_2001 using the available support tools. Inspect the Northwind requester records and active policy before acting.
tool_guidance: Use system evidence rather than the customer's diagnosis.
Confirm policy prerequisites before any write action.

hidden_truth.diagnosis: The credential update succeeded, but Mira remains blocked by an account lockout. Identity verification has not started, so support must escalate with evidence rather than unlock.
expected_behavior: Bind tkt_2001 to usr_mira_sen on acct_northwind_prod.
Inspect failed login, lockout, reset, and post-reset evidence.
Escalate because the requester is not verified.

required_evidence.claim: The requester had three failed password-stage login attempts.
The auth system recorded an account lock event for the requester.
The requester's credential reset completed successfully.
A later login was blocked by the existing lock state.
No verified identity check exists for this ticket.
The active policy requires verification before unlock.

required_policy_behavior.rationale: The requester has no verified identity record.

forbidden_actions.reason: The active policy requires verified identity before unlock.

failure_traps.description: The issue follows a credential update.
failure_traps.trigger: Agent claims the reset failed despite successful evidence.
